final_prompt.prompt:
Create a technical step-by-step instructional diagram illustrating how to deploy hermes inside a docker container and integrate glmcodingplan.

Style/medium: needs a clean technical-diagram / infographic aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a vertical multi-step layout with clearly numbered steps 1, 2, 3, 4
Subject: must include all 4 deployment steps:
  Step 1: setting up the docker environment / pulling the hermes image
  Step 2: launching the hermes container with configuration
  Step 3: integrating glmcodingplan into the running container
  Step 4: verification and connection confirmation
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs a technical / developer-tool direction — exact color scheme is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include step labels "1" "2" "3" "4", "hermes", "docker", "glmcodingplan"
Constraints: must preserve clear visual separation between each numbered step; each step must contain command/code block area and a brief annotation zone
Avoid: must avoid decorative clutter that obscures technical readability
